name: mrcx
description: Mr C & Mr X - AI development duo collaboration tool

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mrcx/core && npm run build -w @mrcx/server && npm run build -w @mrcx/web && npm run build -w @mrcx/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mrcx/core && npm run test -w @mrcx/server && npm run test -w @mrcx/cli
